results.definition_en: In the space that has one thing on one side and another thing on the other side.
results.example_en: The cat is between the two chairs.

results.definition_en: Near to a thing; or used to say who or what does an act.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 在……旁邊；由（某人事物）所為。
results.example_en: The book is by the window.

results.definition_en: From a higher place to a lower place.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 向下、往下；從高處到低處。
results.example_en: Put the bag down on the floor.

results.definition_en: Word used to say where a thing or person has come.
results.example_en: I come from a small town.

results.definition_en: Inside a place or a thing.
results.example_en: The keys are in my pocket.

results.definition_en: Away from, or not on a thing.
results.example_en: Take your shoes off before you come in.

results.definition_en: Touching the top side of a thing; or going on.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 在……上面（接觸）；持續進行中。
results.example_en: The book is on the table.

results.definition_en: Higher than a thing, or from one side to the other side.
results.example_en: A bird is flying over the house.

results.definition_en: From one side of a thing to the other side, going inside it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 穿過、通過；從一端到另一端。
results.example_en: We walked through the park.

results.definition_en: Word used to say where a thing or person is going.
results.example_en: She went to the shop yesterday.

results.definition_en: In a lower place than a thing.
results.example_en: The cat is sleeping under the bed.

results.definition_en: From a lower place to a higher place.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 向上、往上；從低處到高處。
results.example_en: She put her hand up to answer.

results.definition_en: Together with a thing or a person.
results.example_en: I will come with my friend.

results.definition_en: In the same way that; or while.
results.example_en: Do as I say, not as I do.
results.example_zh_tw: 照我說的做，不是照我做的做。

results.definition_en: Word used to say who or what gets a thing, or what an act is done.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 為了、給；表示對象或目的。
results.example_en: This gift is for you.

results.definition_en: Word used to say what a thing comes from or is part of.
results.example_en: A cup of tea, please.

results.definition_en: Up to the time when a thing comes.
results.example_en: We will wait till you come back.

results.definition_en: Word used after a comparison, to say what the other thing is.
results.example_en: She is taller than her brother.

results.definition_en: Word used before a thing when it is only one and not a special one.
results.example_en: I saw a dog on the road.

results.definition_en: Word used before a thing when it is the special one talked about.
results.example_en: The dog on the road is mine.

results.definition_en: Every part of a thing, or every one of a group.
results.example_en: All the children went home.

results.definition_en: One or some, no matter which one.
results.example_en: Take any book you like.
results.example_zh_tw: 你想拿哪一本書都可以。

results.definition_en: Each one of a group, with no one left out.
results.example_en: Every child has a book.

results.definition_en: Not one; not any.
results.example_en: There is no milk in the bottle.

results.definition_en: Not this one, but another one.
results.example_en: Give me the other book, please.
